_note: Curated prompts for the GAME-ONLY fighters agents may generate (CLAUDE.md MODEL OWNERSHIP DIRECTIVE). Book/canon chars + Onyx's stable are the owner's — never here.

_rules.1_no_trademarked_logos: NEVER put real brand/promotion logos on anything (WWE/AEW/Nike/etc). If a mark is wanted, invent a PROPRIETARY Bannon-universe emblem; otherwise leave gear blank. Always modify any logo-like motif to something original to our universe.
_rules.2_coherent_attire_only: Believable pro-wrestling attire ONLY. NO nonsensical gear — no weird suspenders, no nipple straps/attachments, no floating pieces, nothing without a real wrestling rationale. Every element must make sense in context.
_rules.3_ethnicity_is_identity: Race/ethnicity is part of the character. Generate the specified ethnicity with the right skin tone; keep the roster diverse. Known so far: VIPER, ZEPHYR, GOLEM = Black (various tones). Owner names others.
_rules.4_semirealistic_likeness: Semi-realistic pro-wrestler LIKENESS (WWE 2K / Fire Pro / sim-game fidelity) that matches the character's gimmick, fighting style, psychology, and race — grounded athletes, NOT cartoon superheroes.
_rules.5_clean_seed: Full-body, front-facing, symmetrical A-pose, plain flat white background = a clean image->3D seed.

_style: full-body front-facing symmetrical A-pose, arms slightly away from the body, feet shoulder-width, plain flat white background, even studio lighting, semi-realistic photoreal pro-wrestler likeness, grounded and lifelike, full figure head to boots centered. ATTIRE IS STRICT: plain solid-color trunks or tights and boots only, bare chest with absolutely NO straps and NO suspenders and NO singlet straps over the shoulders, completely blank gear surfaces with NO logos, NO emblems, NO brand marks, NO text, NO symbols anywhere on trunks kneepads boots or wrists — clean unmarked professional wrestling gear
_negative: suspenders, shoulder straps, singlet straps, logos, brand logo, WWE logo, emblem, text, watermark, symbols, cartoon, superhero costume, nipple straps, floating gear, nonsensical straps

VIPER.prompt: a lean Black southpaw counter-puncher pro wrestler, deep brown skin, short slick fade, plain icy pale-blue and gunmetal-silver wrestling trunks and matching kickpads and boots, BARE CHEST with no straps or suspenders of any kind, taped wrists, cold calculating expression, athletic cruiserweight build

VIPER_attire2.prompt: a Black boxer-turned-fighter, deep brown skin, young Mike Tyson face blended with the character's own features, short boxer fade haircut (Mike Tyson / Balrog style), stocky powerful heavyweight-boxer physique (Mike Tyson body type mixed with an athletic wrestler), BARE CHEST no shirt no straps, white boxing hand wraps and red fingerless MMA gloves, ice-blue snakeskin-pattern MMA fight shorts, barefoot, intense intimidating Chuck-Liddell-meets-Tyson menace

KAGE.prompt: an East Asian karate-striker pro wrestler, black shadow-gi vest with torn sleeves over bare chest, black trunks and shin guards, close-cropped hair, lean muscular, intense disciplined stare

BRUTUS.prompt: a massive iron-brawler pro wrestler, rugged pale scarred skin, shaved head, rust-red and gunmetal plain trunks with a thick plated belt, bare chest no straps, wrist chains, heavyweight powerhouse build

ZEPHYR.prompt: an agile Black Brazilian capoeira-style high-flyer pro wrestler, tan brown Brazilian skin, a full natural afro, teal and white wind-motif plain trunks and long tights, bare chest no straps, barefoot-look wrestling boots, lean fast athletic build

MORTUS.prompt: a grim death-archetype pro wrestler, bone-white and black skull body paint, gaunt lean frame, tattered black shroud shorts and torn wrist tape, bare chest no straps, sunken intense eyes

RONIN.prompt: a masterless-samurai pro wrestler, East Asian, topknot, deep crimson and black lacquered-armor-styled trunks and kickpads with a single shoulder guard, bare chest no straps, disciplined stern look, athletic build

TITAN.prompt: a colossal powerhouse pro wrestler, tanned rugged skin, square jaw, bronze and navy plain trunks over a huge frame, bare chest no straps, championship-giant presence, super-heavyweight build

GOLEM.ethnicity: Black man, grey stone-clay skin gimmick
GOLEM.prompt: a colossal super-heavyweight pro wrestler, a Black man with clearly African facial features (broad nose, strong brow, full lips, dark eyes), a living-stone gimmick giving him grey clay-colored cracked stone-textured skin over those Black features, earthen brown plain trunks and boots, bare chest no straps, faint glowing seams in the cracks, immovable massive build
